requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — No Mandatory Horizontal EMC Regime; ENACOM for Radio Only
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——无强制横向EMC制度；ENACOM仅适用于无线电
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——無強制橫向EMC制度；ENACOM僅適用於無線電

summary.en: Argentina does NOT operate an EU-style mandatory horizontal EMC regime for general household appliances comparable to EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. A conventional household refrigerator without wireless connectivity is not subject to a standalone mandatory EMC certification in Argentina; the mandatory pre-market gate for such a refrigerator is the 'S' electrical-safety mark (Resolucion 169/2018) plus the energy-efficiency label, not an EMC certificate. Where a refrigerator incorporates radio functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), that radio module must instead be homologated by ENACOM (Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones), Argentina's telecommunications regulator, under its equipment-homologation regime (Resolucion ENACOM frameworks), which covers radio-spectrum and certain conducted/radiated emission aspects of the radio transmitter. IRAM does publish EMC standards adopting CISPR/IEC for voluntary or contractual use, but for a non-connected refrigerator these are not a mandatory market-access condition.
summary.zh: 阿根廷不像欧盟那样对一般家用器具实行可比于欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的强制横向EMC制度。不带无线连接的常规家用电冰箱在阿根廷无须取得独立的强制EMC认证；该类电冰箱的强制市场前门槛是"S"电气安全标志（第169/2018号决议）加能效标签，而非EMC证书。若电冰箱包含无线电功能（如用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），该无线电模块须改由阿根廷电信监管机构ENACOM（国家通信局）按其设备认证制度（ENACOM决议框架）进行型号核准，该制度涵盖无线电频谱及无线电发射器的部分传导/辐射发射方面。IRAM确实发布采用CISPR/IEC的EMC标准供自愿或合同使用，但对于不联网的电冰箱，这些标准不是强制市场准入条件。
summary.zht: 阿根廷不像歐盟那樣對一般家用器具實行可比於歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的強制橫向EMC制度。不帶無線連接的常規家用電冰箱在阿根廷無須取得獨立的強制EMC認證；該類電冰箱的強制市場前門檻是"S"電氣安全標誌（第169/2018號決議）加能效標籤，而非EMC證書。若電冰箱包含無線電功能（如用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），該無線電模組須改由阿根廷電信監管機構ENACOM（國家通信局）按其設備認證制度（ENACOM決議框架）進行型號核准，該制度涵蓋無線電頻譜及無線電發射器的部分傳導/輻射發射方面。IRAM確實發布採用CISPR/IEC的EMC標準供自願或合同使用，但對於不聯網的電冰箱，這些標準不是強制市場准入條件。

standards_or_laws: No mandatory horizontal EMC certification for general household refrigerators in Argentina (no direct equivalent to EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU)
ENACOM (Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones) — equipment homologation regime — applies only where the appliance contains a radio module (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)
IRAM/IEC CISPR 14-1 (IRAM adoption) — EMC emission standard for household appliances — available but not a mandatory market-access condition for non-connected refrigerators

summary.en: In China, EMC for household appliances IS mandatory: GB 4343.1-2018 (emission, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) is a compulsory part of the CCC certification for household refrigerators, with GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity) recommended and GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonics) mandatory where applicable. EMC testing for refrigerators is therefore a standard, mandatory step in the Chinese market. This is a notable structural difference: a Chinese exporter already holds mandatory EMC test data (GB 4343.1) for the domestic CCC, but Argentina does not require a corresponding mandatory EMC certificate for a non-connected refrigerator — so the Chinese EMC effort exceeds the Argentine baseline for that product class, except where a radio module triggers ENACOM homologation.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用器具的EMC是强制的：GB 4343.1-2018（发射，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）是家用电冰箱CCC认证的强制组成部分，GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度）为推荐性，GB 17625.1-2022（谐波）在适用时为强制性。因此电冰箱的EMC检测在中国市场是标准的强制步骤。这是一项显著的结构性差异：中国出口商已为国内CCC持有强制EMC检测数据（GB 4343.1），但阿根廷对不联网电冰箱不要求相应的强制EMC证书——故就该产品类别而言，中国的EMC工作量超过阿根廷基线，除非无线电模块触发ENACOM型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用器具的EMC是強制的：GB 4343.1-2018（發射，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）是家用電冰箱CCC認證的強制組成部分，GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度）為推薦性，GB 17625.1-2022（諧波）在適用時為強制性。因此電冰箱的EMC檢測在中國市場是標準的強制步驟。這是一項顯著的結構性差異：中國出口商已為國內CCC持有強制EMC檢測數據（GB 4343.1），但阿根廷對不聯網電冰箱不要求相應的強制EMC證書——故就該產品類別而言，中國的EMC工作量超過阿根廷基線，除非無線電模組觸發ENACOM型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods for household appliances (mandatory under CCC; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory where applicable; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The gap here runs opposite to most rows: Argentina is LESS prescriptive than China on EMC for non-connected refrigerators. (1) For a standard refrigerator without radio functionality, there is no mandatory Argentine EMC certificate to obtain — the exporter's existing CCC EMC data (GB 4343.1) generally exceeds what Argentina requires for that product class, and no Argentine EMC re-test is needed for market access. (2) Where the refrigerator is a 'smart' model with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, the radio module must be homologated by ENACOM, which is a distinct mandatory step with its own application, local representative, and emission/spectrum requirements — Chinese CCC or SRRC radio data is not accepted; ENACOM homologation must be obtained in-country. (3) Even though horizontal EMC is not mandatory, importers may still face contractual or retailer EMC expectations; IRAM CISPR-based standards can be used to demonstrate emission performance voluntarily. Exporters should confirm current ENACOM scope for the specific radio module before assuming exemption.
gap.zh: 此处的差距与多数行相反：就不联网电冰箱而言，阿根廷在EMC方面比中国宽松。（1）对于不带无线电功能的标准电冰箱，无须取得强制的阿根廷EMC证书——出口商现有的CCC EMC数据（GB 4343.1）通常超过阿根廷对该产品类别的要求，市场准入无须阿根廷EMC重新检测。（2）若电冰箱为带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的"智能"型号，该无线电模块须由ENACOM进行型号核准，这是一项独立的强制步骤，具有自身的申请、本地代表及发射/频谱要求——中国CCC或SRRC无线电数据不被接受；ENACOM型号核准须在境内取得。（3）即使横向EMC非强制，进口商仍可能面临合同或零售商的EMC期望；可自愿使用基于CISPR的IRAM标准证明发射性能。出口商在假定豁免前应针对具体无线电模块确认现行ENACOM适用范围。
gap.zht: 此處的差距與多數行相反：就不聯網電冰箱而言，阿根廷在EMC方面比中國寬鬆。（1）對於不帶無線電功能的標準電冰箱，無須取得強制的阿根廷EMC證書——出口商現有的CCC EMC數據（GB 4343.1）通常超過阿根廷對該產品類別的要求，市場准入無須阿根廷EMC重新檢測。（2）若電冰箱為帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的"智能"型號，該無線電模組須由ENACOM進行型號核准，這是一項獨立的強制步驟，具有自身的申請、本地代表及發射/頻譜要求——中國CCC或SRRC無線電數據不被接受；ENACOM型號核准須在境內取得。（3）即使橫向EMC非強制，進口商仍可能面臨合同或零售商的EMC期望；可自願使用基於CISPR的IRAM標準證明發射性能。出口商在假定豁免前應針對具體無線電模組確認現行ENACOM適用範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory as a standalone EMC certificate for non-connected household refrigerators (no EU-style horizontal EMC regime); ENACOM radio homologation is mandatory only if the appliance contains a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth radio module
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1-2018 EMC emission testing is a compulsory part of CCC certification for household refrigerators; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: ENACOM — Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones, Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina has no EU-style mandatory horizontal EMC regime for non-connected household refrigerators — the mandatory gates are the 'S' safety mark and the energy label, not an EMC certificate. Chinese CCC EMC data (GB 4343.1) generally exceeds the Argentine baseline for this product. Only 'smart' refrigerators with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth trigger mandatory ENACOM radio homologation, which must be obtained in-country and does not accept Chinese radio approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷对不联网家用电冰箱没有欧盟式强制横向EMC制度——强制门槛是"S"安全标志和能效标签，而非EMC证书。中国CCC EMC数据（GB 4343.1）通常超过阿根廷对该产品的基线。只有带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的"智能"电冰箱才触发强制ENACOM无线电型号核准，须在境内取得，且不接受中国无线电批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷對不聯網家用電冰箱沒有歐盟式強制橫向EMC制度——強制門檻是"S"安全標誌和能效標籤，而非EMC證書。中國CCC EMC數據（GB 4343.1）通常超過阿根廷對該產品的基線。只有帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的"智能"電冰箱才觸發強制ENACOM無線電型號核准，須在境內取得，且不接受中國無線電批准。
